ddls:
CREATE TABLE "political_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the political office (e.g., U.S. Senate Alabama) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the political office is located */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of political office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "office_level" TEXT /* Level of the political office (e.g., national, state, municipal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the elected official associated with the account */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle or identifier on the social media platform */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username on the social media platform */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the social media account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the account is currently active */,
  "account_category" TEXT /* Category of the social media account (e.g., personal, official, campaign) */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the social media account is verified or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_account_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account that changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., handle, username, platform) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_account_changes_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES social_media_accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party (e.g., Republican, Democratic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the political party */,
  "party_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the political party */,
  "party_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol associated with the political party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device during access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Information about the user's device (e.g., browser type, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
